dashboard.title: Available Report Types
dashboard.subtitle: Generate, preview, and download reports instantly in multiple formats using live project data

messages.export_failed: Export failed: Server returned an internal error (500).

risk_register.title: Risk Register Report
risk_register.desc: All project risks with their scores, actions, statuses, and details.

project_comparison.title: Pattern Analysis & Comparison Report
project_comparison.desc: Displays the most frequent and selected risks across the system to identify common gaps.
project_comparison.include_1: Descending risk ranking based on frequency rate
project_comparison.include_2: Average severity score of the overall pattern

lessons_learned.title: Lessons Learned Report
lessons_learned.desc: Collects content from the lessons learned field and engineers' notes, categorized by risk type.
lessons_learned.include_1: Logs of past lessons and experiences

overdue_actions.title: Overdue Actions Report
overdue_actions.desc: Risks that exceeded their action deadlines without being closed, sending alerts to the relevant manager.
overdue_actions.include_2: Identification of parties responsible for delays and warnings
